title: Rotorua Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Rotorua, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance. Save up to 40% on activities with Bookme.co.nz
intro: Rotorua is a top destination for families, with its unique geothermal parks and wide range of activities. To make the most of your trip, we've rounded up the best family deals in Rotorua, including discounts on activities, campervan hire, and travel insurance. With prices starting from $250-400 per day for a family of four, Rotorua is an affordable and fun destination for all ages.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Rotorua, including Te Puia, Wai-O-Tapu Thermal Wonderland, and Skyline Rotorua Gondola & Luge. Discover Cars has family campervans from $89 per day, while Booking.com offers free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings.

Cover-More also provides comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50 per day. These deals can help you save money and make the most of your trip to Rotorua.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89 per day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50 per day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities in Rotorua
sections.body:
Rotorua has a wide range of activities to suit all ages and interests. Some of the best-value activities include Te Puia, which offers a combination of geothermal wonders and Maori culture, and Wai-O-Tapu Thermal Wonderland, which features stunning geothermal landscapes.

The Agrodome Farm Show is another great option, with a fun and interactive show that's perfect for families. For the more adventurous, OGO Rotorua offers zorbing and other adrenaline-pumping activities.
list: Te Puia: geothermal park and Maori culture
Agrodome Farm Show: interactive farm show
OGO Rotorua: zorbing and adventure activities

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body: To save money on your trip to Rotorua, consider the following tips:
list: Book activities and accommodations in advance to get the best prices
Use Bookme.co.nz to get up to 40% off activities
Consider a family campervan instead of separate hotel rooms
Pack your own food and snacks instead of eating out
Take advantage of free activities such as the Government Gardens and Lake Rotorua foreshore walk
Look for package deals that include multiple activities and accommodations

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on activities and accommodations in Rotorua, it's a good idea to book in advance. Many operators offer early bird discounts or special deals for bookings made well in advance.

Additionally, consider visiting during the off-season (April to May or September to November) when prices tend to be lower. Avoid peak season (December to March) if possible, as prices tend to be higher during this time.
